atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Define custom design tokens (colors, fonts, breakpoints, etc.) in Tailwind CSS v4.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Explicitly specify files or patterns for Tailwind CSS to scan for class names.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Register custom utility classes that support Tailwind variants.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Apply a Tailwind variant directly to a block of styles.

atDirectives.name: @custom-variant
atDirectives.description: Define a custom utility/variant selector or media query.
